Property.Name: CreationDate
Property.sap:label: Creation Date
Property.sap:quickinfo: Date on Which the Record Was Added

Property.Name: syst
Property.sap:label: Target System
Property.sap:quickinfo: Logical system from which message originates

Property.Name: type
Property.sap:label: Message Type
Property.sap:quickinfo: Message type: S Success, E Error, W Warning, I Info, A Abort
